afterSnapshot.name: ROUTE_RISK_STRONG_WIND_KNOTS
afterSnapshot.description: Wind speed (knots) at or above which a leg counts as 'strong wind' — it degrades ETA reliability (extra ETA-uncertainty drift) and contributes to the wind risk factor.

context.userMessage: Approved. Go ahead with the plan.

rationale: Strong wind both raises the wind factor and reduces speed reliability for ETA.
implementation: Mirrors the ROUTE_* config convention and feeds both the wind and ETA factors.
